evals.prompt:
hey can you turn these into a task list?

---
Product sync – March 18 2026
Attendees: Sarah (PM), Dev (backend), Mia (design), Tom (QA)

We talked about the upcoming v2.1 release. Launch is March 28.

- Sarah said the onboarding flow redesign needs to be done before we release. Mia is handling the wireframes, needs to be done by March 21 so dev can implement.
- Dev mentioned the payment webhook is still broken on sandbox. He'll fix it this week, it's a blocker.
- Tom hasn't started regression testing yet – needs to start by March 24 at the latest or we'll miss the launch window.
- We need to write release notes before launch. Sarah said she'll draft them but needs input from dev on what changed technically.
- Someone (nobody claimed it) needs to update the docs for the new API endpoints. Mia suggested we do a quick loom video too.
- The analytics dashboard is broken in Safari – not a launch blocker but should be fixed soon. Dev will look into it after the release.
- Sarah wants a go/no-go meeting on March 26. She'll send the invite.
---

can you make each task ready to paste into claude so it can do the work?
evals.expected_output: A summary table with all 7+ tasks, each with owner, priority, and due date where specified. Followed by individual AI-agent-ready task blocks — each self-contained with context, concrete steps, assignee, and due date. High priority on the payment webhook fix and Mia's wireframes due to blockers/deadline. Go/no-go meeting invite should be a Communication task.

evals.prompt:
here are my notes from today's backend team standup, can you extract the action items and make a proper todo list?

Standup notes 3/18:
- alice: finished auth refactor PR, waiting on review from bob. also discovered that the session token TTL logic has a bug where it doesn't handle timezone offsets correctly — filed issue #847
- bob: reviewing alice's PR today. blocked on the redis cluster upgrade because ops team hasn't provisioned the new nodes yet. bob will ping ops (jake) about it
- carol: working on the data export feature. the CSV generation is done, still need to wire up the S3 upload and add retry logic. estimates 2 more days
- team decision: we're going to use structured logging (pino) across all new services starting now. carol will add it to the data export service as she finishes. alice will document the convention in the backend README
- also need to add integration tests for the auth refactor before it can merge — bob mentioned this
- reminder: sprint review is friday, everyone should have their items demoed or marked done
evals.expected_output: A clean task list covering: reviewing alice's PR (bob, high), pinging ops about redis nodes (bob, medium), finishing S3 upload + retry logic for data export (carol, medium), adding pino structured logging to data export service (carol, medium), documenting logging convention in README (alice, medium), adding integration tests for auth refactor (medium, before merge), preparing sprint review items (friday deadline). Summary table plus AI-agent-ready blocks with clear context.

evals.prompt:
I just got out of a long planning session, my brain is fried. here are my rough notes — lots of things mixed together, some things were just discussed but a few are actual todos. can you sort it all out and give me a clean task list formatted so I can paste each task into claude to work on?

=== planning session notes ===
talked about Q2 roadmap. main themes: retention, performance, mobile parity

retention:
- churn is at 8% which is bad. need to understand why. -> spike: analyze churn data from mixpanel, look at cohorts from jan-mar. who's churning and at what point in lifecycle?
- idea: add email drip campaign for users who haven't logged in for 7 days. not sure if this is the right move. needs product sign-off from lisa
- subscription cancellation page — we should add a "pause instead of cancel" option. this one is approved and prioritized. design + dev work needed.

performance:
- homepage loads in 4.2s on mobile, goal is sub-2s. jake looked at it and thinks it's the hero image and 3 blocking JS scripts. -> optimize hero image (webp, lazy load) and defer non-critical JS
- database query for user feed is N+1, has been on the backlog forever. now it's causing timeouts on accounts with >1000 connections. urgent fix needed.
- CDN caching headers are wrong, static assets are being re-fetched every request. quick fix, someone just needs to do it

mobile:
- ios app is missing the notifications tab that android has. 3 sprints of work estimated.
- push notifications are broken on ios 17.4+ (regression from last month). super urgent, lots of user complaints
- android: dark mode looks bad on samsung devices specifically (OLED screens). medium priority, aesthetic issue

other:
- we never documented the data retention policy after legal asked us to. someone needs to write that doc. probably high priority given compliance.
- offsite planning in april, need to book venue
===
evals.expected_output: Should separate actual tasks from pure discussion. High-priority items: fix N+1 query, fix iOS push notification regression, write data retention policy doc. Medium: optimize homepage performance, fix CDN caching, pause-vs-cancel feature (design + dev). Low/research: churn analysis spike, email drip campaign (needs sign-off), Samsung dark mode fix. Long-horizon: iOS notifications tab (3 sprints), book offsite venue. Each task should be clearly scoped as an AI-agent-ready block with context and concrete steps.
